posts.author: BakerElara24
posts.text: Finally nailed my sourdough crust today! It's been a bit of a learning curve, but the smell in the kitchen is amazing. Worth every minute of kneading.
posts.explanation: This post is a harmless personal hobby update with no safety or policy concerns.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: HannahHartley
posts.text: Honestly annoyed that the local council keeps changing the parking rules on High Street. First they ban double-parking, then they say no loading during peak hours, and now they're clamping for 'obstruction' when you just have a pram out. It's absolute chaos and nobody tells you what to expect until it happens.
posts.explanation: This post expresses frustration with local regulations but contains no harmful false claims, threats, or privacy violations; therefore it is safe to approve.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: LibertyLaneUpdates
posts.text: Good news for everyone in Northbridge! The Central Library is hosting a free reading workshop this Saturday from 10am to 2pm. They'll have books on display and refreshments available. Come along if you're interested in catching up on some fiction or non-fiction. #CommunityEvent #Northbridge
posts.explanation: This is a benign community notice with no harmful content; it promotes a safe public event and does not violate any policies.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: GreyfordGardener92
posts.text: Quick update! I've just sent my payment details to support for a deposit. Please check your DMs if you need help with the transfer. #Support
posts.explanation: This post directly asks for sensitive payment information and implies a fraudulent transaction, which is a clear violation requiring removal.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: FestivalFolk84
posts.text: Just got word that the annual Spring Garden Show at Oakhaven Community Centre is happening next weekend! 🌸 They'll have a fantastic display of local plants, some live music from the band 'The Rusty Strings', and kids' craft workshops. It's always a lovely time to meet neighbours and enjoy the flowers. #CommunityEvents #GardenShow
posts.explanation: This post is a harmless announcement for a community event with no evidence of threats, scams, or misinformation; it promotes local culture safely.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.

posts.author: SunnyHedge24
posts.text: Just spotted a lovely little tabby cat sleeping on the fence near my new flat in Dunmere! The rain has been so heavy lately, it's great to see something bright. #Dunmere
posts.explanation: The post is harmless and describes an everyday observation of a pet; no sensitive details or policy violations are present.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: VintageVinylVibes
posts.text: Finally sorted out my record collection! Spent the afternoon dusting off some old jazz albums and they sound crisp as new. Nothing beats that warm crackle on a rainy evening in Westbridge. #Jazz #VinylCollection
posts.explanation: The post describes harmless personal hobbies regarding music and cleaning without promoting violence, self-harm, scams or misinformation.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: HannahTheGardener
posts.text: Honestly, I'm just so over it! My neighbour keeps borrowing tools without asking and then leaves them all over my driveway. I tried to be polite and say hello, but they just ignore me now. It's getting ridiculous.
posts.explanation: This is a complaint about annoying behaviour rather than a safety risk or violation; the user is expressing frustration without promoting harm or revealing private information.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: ElaraVoss
posts.text: Honestly, someone needs to call it out on this! I saw a user yesterday posting about how rude some people are in town. They mentioned that the local council keeps changing parking rules and that it's frustrating when double-parking gets clamped for obstruction. It seems like they're just venting about the situation without targeting anyone specific.
posts.explanation: The user is calmly reporting or criticising rude behaviour without attacking the other person, directing a pile-on or revealing private information.
